title: poa alpigena var. iantha
intro: Poa alpigena var. iantha is a lesser-known, variable grass species found in the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia, belonging to the genus Poa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Poa alpigena var. iantha include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant may include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, and topical creams for various applications.
